name: run_command
description: Run a shell command in the workspace sandbox. Returns the FULL stdout, then a labeled [stderr] block, then [exit <code>] — faithfully, even for non-UTF-8/binary output (decoded with replacement, never dropped). Output over ~1MB per stream is truncated with an explicit [... TRUNCATED ...] marker (never silently). CPU-only; GPU work goes through submit_job.
